description_long: This object appears to be a highly abstracted or distorted representation of a human adult, with elongated and angular features. The form is primarily composed of sharp, faceted surfaces, with a mix of dark and medium brown tones suggesting stylized clothing or body contours. The upper section seems to split into two angular extensions, possibly representing arms or shoulders, while the lower section tapers and twists, lacking clear anatomical detail. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light in a way that emphasizes the geometric facets. There are no visible facial features, hands, or feet, and the overall silhouette is highly stylized rather than realistic. The object gives the impression of a modern art sculpture or a low-polygon digital figure.
description: A highly stylized, angular adult human figure with elongated, faceted surfaces and a glossy finish. The form is abstract, with no clear facial or anatomical details.
description_view_0: This view highlights the twisted, angular upper section and the split extensions, possibly representing arms or shoulders.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the elongated, narrow profile and the smooth, glossy surface along the length of the figure.
description_view_2: This angle shows the sharp, geometric lines of the upper body and the tapering lower section, with pronounced angularity.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals the continuation of the elongated form, with minimal detail and a focus on the abstract silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: abstracted, form-fitting garment with no discernible style or accessories
